task:
Krita is open with /home/user/Documents/pattern.kra loaded.

Enable Wrap-Around mode (for seamless-tile painting) and switch Krita's canvas background to the checker pattern. Both settings must be persisted to `~/.config/kritarc` (Wrap-Around mode is stored under `[General]` as `wrapAroundMode=true`).

Save the file in place at /home/user/Documents/pattern.kra.
